purpose: Historical compatibility placement scenario for co-located LocalAI server and RPC workers.
notes: Placement-only variation anchored to the historical baseline. This scenario now resolves to the explicit PL_COLOCATED placement profile while preserving the original co-located sc-app-02 topology and keeping model, worker count, workload, prompt, temperature, and request timeout fixed.
placementResearchQuestion: How does a compact LocalAI topology behave when communication distance is minimized but CPU and memory contention may increase?
canonicalNamingPolicy: Use placementProfileId for provider-backed cycles; keep PL1/PL2 only for historical fixed-cluster and legacy pilot compatibility.
scenarioProfileName: Historical compatibility placement scenario for co-located LocalAI server and RPC workers.
